issues.title: Key Insights uses technical terms without explanation
issues.description: The insight 'The overall arrest rate is 18.0%, indicating that roughly 1 in 5 crimes result in an arrest' is clear, but 'domestic in nature' is not explained.
issues.expected: Plain language explanation of what 'domestic' means

issues.title: No 'What does this mean for me?' context
issues.description: A citizen wants to know: 'Is my neighborhood safe?' The Analysis page doesn't provide geographic context or actionable takeaways.
issues.expected: Context like 'Your district has X crimes per 1000 residents' or 'Crime is Y% higher in your area'

summary: Analysis page has some clear insights but uses technical terms and lacks actionable context for citizens.
